messages.text:
What it is: Bring the extension unit suite below the 10-second wall-clock target (it records 10.3-13.0s)
What it solves: OPERATOR ASK. "Next absolute priority: bring the unit test suite below 10s." The recorded whole-suite
wall-clock (extension/.test-durations.jsonl duration_ms) is 10.3-13.0s across recent passing runs, over
the 10s target. Suite speed is a correctness property (engineering.prompt Test Speed And Isol…
How it works: A recorded suite run is classified within-budget or over-budget against the 10-second target
